name: Summer Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds vine-ripened tomatoes, peeled, coarsely chopped
4 tablespoons freshly grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
8 ounces thin spaghetti, linguine or penne
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large pot of water for cooking pasta.
2. In a 2 to 3 quart saucepan over medium heat, combine oil and onions. Cover and simmer until onions are soft but not brown.
3. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes uncovered.
4. Stir in tomatoes, basil, salt, and pepper. Increase heat to high.
5. When the sauce begins to bubble, remove from heat and cover.
6. Cook pasta al dente and drain (but not too dry). Return pasta to pot and add a little sauce and 2 tablespoons of grated cheese. Mix well.
7. Serve immediately, adding more sauce and remaining cheese if desired.
